basic_details.job_title: PJTSAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher Posts
basic_details.short_information: Prof. Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTSAU) Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of PJTSAU. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc. (Home Science), MSc. Agril. Economics, MSc. Agril. Statistics, Ph.D/NET desirable
qualification.details: Teaching Associate - Apparel & Textile: MSc. (Home Science), MSc. Agril. Economics Part time Teacher - Apparel & Textile: MSc. (Home Science), MSc. Agril. Economics Teaching Associate - Extension Education & Communication Management: MSc. Agril. Statistics. Desirable: Ph.D/NET in the subject concerned. Experience in teaching, Knowledge of Computers & Handling online classes are essential Part time Teacher - Agricultural Economics: To teach 04 Years Degree Programme Part time Teacher - Human Development and Family Studies: To teach 04 Years Degree Programme Teaching Associate - Resource Management and Consumer science: To teach 04 Years Degree Programme Part time Teacher - Resource Management and Consumer science: To teach 04 Years Degree Programme Part time Teacher - Agronomy: To teach 04 Years Degree Programme

salary_details.details: Teaching Associate - Apparel & Textile: Consolidated Rs. 54,000/- with Ph.D / Rs. 49,000/- without Ph.D Part time Teacher - Apparel & Textile: Rs. 1000/- per hour Maximum upto Rs. 35,000/- Teaching Associate - Extension Education & Communication Management: Consolidated Rs. 54,000/- with Ph.D / Rs. 49,000/- without Ph.D Part time Teacher - Agricultural Economics: Rs. 1000/- per hour Maximum upto Rs. 35,000/- Part time Teacher - Human Development and Family Studies: Rs. 1000/- per hour Maximum upto Rs. 35,000/- Teaching Associate - Resource Management and Consumer science: Consolidated Rs. 54,000/- with Ph.D / Rs. 49,000/- without Ph.D Part time Teacher - Resource Management and Consumer science: Rs. 1000/- per hour Maximum upto Rs. 35,000/- Part time Teacher - Agronomy: Rs. 1000/- per hour Maximum upto Rs. 35,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PJTSAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PJTSAU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PJTSAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PJTSAU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PJTSAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in PJTSAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher posts in Prof. Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the walk-in interview dates for PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview dates for PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher posts are 06 July 2026 and 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for PJTSAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for PJTSAU Recruitment 2026 is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for these posts at PJTSAU?
faq.answer: The job type for the Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher posts at PJTSAU is Contractual.

faq.question: Q5. What are the qualifications required for Teaching Associate posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, generally including MSc. (Home Science), MSc. Agril. Economics, MSc. Agril. Statistics, with Ph.D/NET being desirable for some roles.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Teaching Associate posts at PJTSAU?
faq.answer: Teaching Associates receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 54,000/- with Ph.D and Rs. 49,000/- without Ph.D.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Part Time Teacher posts at PJTSAU?
faq.answer: Part Time Teachers receive Rs. 1000/- per hour, with a maximum upto Rs. 35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for PJTSAU Teaching Associate / Part Time Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview for PJTSAU posts be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the PJTSAU office in Hyderabad, Telangana. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the exact venue details.
